creator: peterj@FreeBSD.org
text:
I am unable to get lang/go to compile on my RPi running -current/arm6hf r279807:

...
# Building packages and commands for freebsd/arm.
...
crypto/x509/pkix
encoding/hex
encoding/pem
runtime/cgo

# net

mime
net/http/internal
...

# os/user
